units.title: Algebra: Polynomials
units.description: Adding, subtracting, multiplying polynomials; factoring and special products

units.title: Quadratic Functions
units.description: Graphing parabolas; vertex form, standard form, and solving quadratics

units.title: Linear Systems and Inequalities
units.description: Systems of equations and inequalities; linear programming intro

units.title: Coordinate Geometry
units.description: Distance, midpoint, slope; equations of lines and circles

units.title: Introduction to Trigonometry
units.description: Right triangle trig; sine, cosine, tangent; angles of elevation and depression

units.title: Kinematics: Motion in One Dimension
units.description: Distance, displacement, speed, velocity, and acceleration; motion graphs

units.title: Newton's Laws of Motion
units.description: Inertia, F=ma, action-reaction; free body diagrams and net force

units.title: Chemical Bonding
units.description: Ionic, covalent, and metallic bonds; electronegativity and polarity

units.title: The Mole and Stoichiometry
units.description: Molar mass, Avogadro's number, mole conversions, and limiting reagents

units.title: Cell Division and Growth
units.description: Mitosis, meiosis, the cell cycle, and cancer biology

units.title: Object-Oriented Programming
units.description: Classes, objects, methods, and attributes; encapsulation and inheritance

units.title: Algorithms and Complexity
units.description: Searching and sorting algorithms; Big O notation and efficiency

units.title: Relational Databases and SQL
units.description: Creating tables, writing queries, joins, and normalization basics

units.title: Networking and Protocols
units.description: OSI model, TCP/IP, HTTP/HTTPS, and network security concepts

units.title: Ethical AI and Society
units.description: Bias, fairness, privacy, and governance of AI systems

units.title: Engineering Graphics and CAD
units.description: Technical drawing, orthographic projection, and 3D modelling

units.title: Materials Science
units.description: Properties of metals, polymers, ceramics; stress, strain, and material testing

units.title: Control Systems
units.description: Open-loop and closed-loop control; PID controllers; real-world examples

units.title: Renewable Energy Systems
units.description: Solar, wind, hydro, and geothermal energy; designing efficient systems
